Internal.Notes:
To calculate the K13 wildtype, calculate the mean of the sample sizes. Then calculate the 
sum of prevalences. Subtract the sum of prevalences from the mean samples size to get 
the number of samples with the wildtype (present).
Note that the K13 sample size of wildtype and SNPs are different, hence could not be displayed on the Surveyor with current algortihm.
